PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env.local; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; Write-Output "URL: $url"; foreach \($table in @\('pricing_plans','contact_requests','job_runs','pending_signups','sepa_mandates'\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$url/rest/v1/$table`?limit=1" -Headers @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" } -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "$table : HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) \(existe\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "$table : HTTP $code \(absente ou erreur\)" } })

PowerShell($env_lines = Get-Content .env.local; $url = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=' }\) -replace '^NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=',''; $key = \($env_lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=' }\) -replace '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=',''; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$url/rest/v1/zz_table_inexistante?limit=1" -Headers @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" } -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "zz_table_inexistante : HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — corps : $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "zz_table_inexistante : HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$url/rest/v1/pending_signups?limit=1" -Headers @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" } -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "pending_signups corps : $\($r2.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r2.Content.Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell($sec = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/securite" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($sec -match 'Vos dossiers patients et vos bilans'\) { "SECURITE: copy NEUF \(statique\) servi" } elseif \($sec -match 'Vos donn.{1,4}es de sant.{1,4},'\) { "SECURITE: copy ANCIEN servi \(DB ?\)" } else { "SECURITE: aucun marqueur trouve" }; $bil = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/bilans" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $morphoIdx = $bil.IndexOf\('Examen morphologique'\); if \($morphoIdx -gt 0\) { $ctx = $bil.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $morphoIdx - 1200\), 1300\); if \($ctx -match 'M4 16v-2\\.38'\) { "BILANS: icone Foot presente" } else { "BILANS: icone Foot ABSENTE autour de l'examen morphologique" } }; $fon = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/fonctionnalites" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($fon -match 'M4 16v-2\\.38'\) { "FONCTIONNALITES: icone Foot presente" } else { "FONCTIONNALITES: icone Foot ABSENTE" })

PowerShell($val = \(\(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^MONETICO_KEY=' }\) -replace '^MONETICO_KEY=',''\).Trim\(\); if \(-not $val\) { Write-Output "MONETICO_KEY : VIDE" } else { $masked = $val.Substring\(0,4\) + '…' + $val.Substring\($val.Length-4\); Write-Output "MONETICO_KEY : longueur $\($val.Length\), commence/finit : $masked"; Write-Output "Format 40 alphanum : $\($val -match '^[0-9A-Za-z]{40}$'\)" })

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch {} }; if \($ok\) { "serveur pret" } else { "serveur toujours indisponible apres 60s" })

PowerShell($key = "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzcwODYyMCwiZXhwIjo0OTM5MzgyMjIwLCJyb2xlIjoic2VydmljZV9yb2xlIn0.NM32RfKKnCzhLQZNoFvu2T2h74OnAaoJh-VDVmeXAiY"; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; $nl = [string][char]10; $rows = Invoke-RestMethod -TimeoutSec 15 -Uri "https://supabase.medicarepro.fr/rest/v1/page_sections?select=id,type,content&type=in.\(home_hero,bento\)" -Headers $h; foreach \($r in $rows\) { if \($r.type -eq 'home_hero'\) { $t = $r.content.title.Replace\($nl, ' / '\); "hero.title = $t \(id $\($r.id\)\)" }; if \($r.type -eq 'bento'\) { "bento.mockup.kind = $\($r.content.mockup.kind\) | kicker = $\($r.content.mockup.kicker\) \(id $\($r.id\)\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $key = "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzcwODYyMCwiZXhwIjo0OTM5MzgyMjIwLCJyb2xlIjoic2VydmljZV9yb2xlIn0.NM32RfKKnCzhLQZNoFvu2T2h74OnAaoJh-VDVmeXAiY"; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; $nl = [string][char]10; try { $rows = Invoke-RestMethod -TimeoutSec 40 -Uri "https://supabase.medicarepro.fr/rest/v1/page_sections?select=id,type,content&type=in.\(home_hero,bento\)" -Headers $h; foreach \($r in $rows\) { if \($r.type -eq 'home_hero'\) { $t = $r.content.title.Replace\($nl, ' / '\); "hero.title = $t \(id $\($r.id\)\)" }; if \($r.type -eq 'bento'\) { "bento.mockup.kind = $\($r.content.mockup.kind\) | kicker = $\($r.content.mockup.kicker\) \(id $\($r.id\)\)" } } } catch { "API toujours indisponible: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r1 = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 87.106.240.105 -Port 443 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "TCP 443 : $\($r1.TcpTestSucceeded\)"; $r2 = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 87.106.240.105 -Port 80 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "TCP 80 : $\($r2.TcpTestSucceeded\)"; $p = Test-Connection 87.106.240.105 -Count 2 -Quiet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "ping : $p")

PowerShell($t = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("c:\\Users\\Nans-\\Projects\\medicarepro\\supabase\\seed.sql"\); $p2 = "`"mockup`":{`"kicker`":`"Agenda & RDV en ligne`",`"title`":`"Vos patients réservent seuls, l''agenda se remplit`",`"kind`":`"agenda`"}"; $r2 = "`"mockup`":{`"kicker`":`"Bilans podologiques`",`"title`":`"Vous menez l''examen, les scores se calculent seuls`",`"kind`":`"bilan`"}"; if \($t.Contains\($p2\)\) { $t = $t.Replace\($p2, $r2\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("c:\\Users\\Nans-\\Projects\\medicarepro\\supabase\\seed.sql", $t, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); "mockup bento remplace" } else { "toujours pas de match" })

PowerShell($key = "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzcwODYyMCwiZXhwIjo0OTM5MzgyMjIwLCJyb2xlIjoic2VydmljZV9yb2xlIn0.NM32RfKKnCzhLQZNoFvu2T2h74OnAaoJh-VDVmeXAiY"; $h = @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key" }; try { $rows = Invoke-RestMethod -TimeoutSec 30 -Uri "https://supabase.medicarepro.fr/rest/v1/page_sections?select=id,type&type=in.\(home_hero,bento\)" -Headers $h; "API revenue — $\($rows.Count\) slots trouves" } catch { "API toujours indisponible" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/dev-revalidate" -TimeoutSec 60; "revalide: $\($r.revalidated.Count\) tags" } catch { "erreur: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120\).Content; if \($html -match 'La podologie a trouv'\) { "HOME: nouveau titre servi" } else { "HOME: encore ancien" }; if \($html -match 'Vous menez l.examen'\) { "BENTO: mockup bilan servi" } else { "BENTO: encore agenda" }; Remove-Item "c:\\Users\\Nans-\\Projects\\medicarepro\\src\\app\\api\\dev-revalidate" -Recurse -Force -Confirm:$false; "route supprimee")

PowerShell($sec = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/securite" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content; if \($sec -match 'Vos dossiers patients et vos bilans'\) { "SECURITE: copy NEUF" } elseif \($sec -match 'Vos donn'\) { "SECURITE: copy ANCIEN \(DB\)" }; $tar = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tarifs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content; if \($tar -match 'un logiciel de podologie complet'\) { "TARIFS: copy NEUF" } else { "TARIFS: copy ANCIEN \(DB\)" }; $con = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/contact" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content; if \($con -match 'cabinet de podologie'\) { "CONTACT: copy NEUF" } else { "CONTACT: copy ANCIEN \(DB\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const key='eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsImlhdCI6MTc4MzcwODYyMCwiZXhwIjo0OTM5MzgyMjIwLCJyb2xlIjoic2VydmljZV9yb2xlIn0.NM32RfKKnCzhLQZNoFvu2T2h74OnAaoJh-VDVmeXAiY'; fetch\('https://supabase.medicarepro.fr/rest/v1/page_sections?select=id,type&type=in.\(home_hero,bento\)', { headers: { apikey: key, Authorization: 'Bearer ' + key }, signal: AbortSignal.timeout\(20000\) }\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(j => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j\)\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERREUR: ' + e.message\)\)")
